name: 绿光测距仪调试
description: 仅保留固件启用的基础调试命令，方便排查

commands.name: 频道1波形
commands.command: AA EE A0 00 00 00 00 A0 BB FF

commands.name: 频道2波形
commands.command: AA EE A1 00 00 00 00 A1 BB FF

commands.name: 频道3波形
commands.command: AA EE A2 00 00 00 00 A2 BB FF

commands.name: 频道4波形
commands.command: AA EE A3 00 00 00 00 A3 BB FF

commands.name: APD +2
commands.command: AA EE A4 00 00 00 00 A4 BB FF

commands.name: APD -2
commands.command: AA EE A5 00 00 00 00 A5 BB FF

commands.name: 搜索APD
commands.command: AA EE AC 00 00 00 00 AC BB FF

commands.name: 打开1.8mW激光
commands.command: AA EE AD 00 00 00 00 AD BB FF

commands.name: 打开0.8mW激光
commands.command: AA EE AE 00 00 00 00 AE BB FF

commands.name: 读取校准数据
commands.command: AA EE 01 00 00 00 00 01 BB FF

commands.name: 相位校准
commands.command: AA EE 02 00 00 00 00 02 BB FF

commands.name: 速度校准
commands.command: AA EE 09 00 00 00 00 09 BB FF

commands.name: 设备校准
commands.command: AA EE 90 00 00 00 00 90 BB FF

commands.name: LD功率 +10
commands.command: AA EE B1 00 00 00 00 B1 BB FF

commands.name: LD功率 -10
commands.command: AA EE B2 00 00 00 00 B2 BB FF

commands.name: 切换调试模式
commands.command: AA EE 03 00 00 00 00 03 BB FF

commands.name: 测量数据
commands.command: AA EE 0C 00 00 00 00 0C BB FF

commands.name: 拟合测试
commands.command: AA EE CC 00 0A 00 00 C6 BB FF

commands.name: 获取距离
commands.command: AA EE FB 00 00 00 00 FB BB FF

commands.name: 设置功率1
commands.command: AA EE C1 00 00 00 00 C1 BB FF

commands.name: 设置功率2
commands.command: AA EE C2 00 00 00 00 C2 BB FF

commands.name: 获取功率
commands.command: AA EE C3 00 00 00 00 C3 BB FF

commands.name: 保存功率
commands.command: AA EE C4 00 00 00 00 C4 BB FF

commands.name: 调试功率Flash
commands.command: AA EE C5 00 00 00 00 C5 BB FF

commands.name: 设置双功率并保存
commands.command: AA EE C6 00 00 00 00 C6 BB FF

commands.name: 查看功率状态
commands.command: AA EE C7 00 00 00 00 C7 BB FF
